title: Regional compensation structure: 97% local currency, base-salary dominant, monthly reporting
summary: Regional currency usage shows 97% of payments in Southeast Asian currencies (IDR 76.2%, SGD 10.0%, MYR 5.2%). Monthly pay reporting at 94.55%. Base salary dominates at 83% across all levels, with variable components increasing at senior positions (bonus up to 11.3% at Head level). Healthcare leads benefits at 52%, with growing focus on flexibility.
methodology: Self-reported compensation currency, frequency, structure components, and benefits in anonymous online survey
